title: osmunda claytoniana var. vera
intro: Osmunda claytoniana var. vera, also known as the royal fern or Clayton's royal fern, is a variety of fern that belongs to the genus Osmunda and is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as arthritis, skin conditions, and wounds. The health benefits of Osmunda claytoniana var. vera include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
